text: Hey son, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything good?
Yeah all good Dad sorry been swamped with work lol. How are you and mum doing?
We're fine, don't worry about us. Just eat properly and get some rest. Call when you can 🙏
Brian baby just checking on you, haven't heard from you since Tuesday 😕
Mum I'm fine lol been busy with work stuff. Sorry for going quiet
Okay okay just making sure. Call me this weekend yeah? I'll make jollof 😄
yo bri you free this weekend? tryna see if you wanna come watch the game at mine saturday
yeah man I'm down, what time? I got some stuff in the morning but free after like 2
perfect kickoff's at 4 so come whenever, I'll grab drinks 🍺
yo bri! haven't heard from you in ages man, how's life been treating you?
theo!! dude it's been way too long lol. life's been crazy busy tbh but good. you still in austin?
haha yeah still here! we need to catch up properly, maybe a call this week?
Brian!! it's been forever omg how are you doing??
Destiny!! I know right lol life has been crazy busy but good good. how about you, still living in Austin?
yes still here haha! we need to actually catch up soon, like a real call not just instagram likes 😂
Brian! Haven't heard from you in a while, just wanted to check in. Everything okay with you? 💙
Aunt Grace!! I'm good, sorry been so hectic lately. Work has been crazy but I'm hanging in there
As long as you're alright! Don't forget to eat properly and get some rest. Come visit soon okay? Miss your face 😊
Hey son, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything good?
Yeah all good Dad sorry been swamped with work lol. How are you and mum doing?
Hey son, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything good?
Sorry mom, been slammed. Midterm week. Doing okay.
Are you eating? Priya said you skipped dinner Tuesday.
I ate. Just late. Priya is a snitch.
I sent the care package today. Should arrive Friday.
Thank you. Tell dad I got his passport reminder.
How is the paper for Dr. Voss going?
Section 2 needs another pass. She wants me to push back on Peterson.
You will. Dad and I are proud of you always.
Love you.
Emeka asked me to remind you about his UMich essay.
On it tonight.
Water bottle full today?
Yes mom.
The chin chin is in the box.
Best news of the week.
Are you sleeping enough?
Six hours. That is enough for now.
Five is not enough. Six is the floor.
Copy. Six or more.
Sunday call at 6 as usual?
Yes. I'll be free.
Dad wants to hear about the SGA transit thing.
Tell him I'll walk him through it.
Brian - passport renewal. Do it this month.
Started the form today. Should be done tomorrow.
Good. What's the DC internship timeline?
Decision by January 5. Interviews next week.
Prepare. Do not wing it.
I know. I'm reading Kingman tonight.
How much sleep last night?
Six.
That is the floor. Do not go under.
Yes sir.
Your mother said you are eating.
Priya makes sure of it.
Good roommate. Tell her thank you from us.
Will do.
Sunday call after church.
I'll be ready.
Did you fill the water bottle today?
Twice. On my third refill.
yo can you look at my UMich essay tonight
send it. i'll get to it after tutoring
sent. ending feels off
read it. the ending is fine but the third paragraph is doing too much
which sentence
the one starting with 'furthermore'. cut it. it's academic filler
done
also drop the word 'passionate'. every essay has passionate. yours doesn't need it
roger
how's the app tracker looking
6 down, 3 to go
priority the ones with the earliest deadlines
already sorted
good. tell mom i'll call sunday
she knows
of course she does
hey. still on for saturday?
yeah. ramen still on the table?
yes. line moves fast at 7
i'll walk over at 6:45
also i fixed the shelf
you are a wonder
no need to flatter. i already like you
shameless
how's the paper
section 2 is fighting me
you'll get it. voss likes your writing
she likes my sourcing. the writing is a work in progress
want to study at mine tonight
yes. i'll bring lo-fi and a very tired brain
bringing you food too. no arguments
no arguments
post-run stretch tomorrow morning?
if my hip agrees
hydrate first
already have the bottle
we're out of oat milk. AGAIN
on it. instacart order going in tonight
also toilet paper. also eggs. also that hot sauce
you love the hot sauce more than i do
irrelevant. add it
added
when is the electric bill due
the 15th. i'll venmo my half tomorrow
you already did. i just checked
then i owe past me a coffee
you owe me one too. saw you skip dinner tuesday
i ate. eventually
eventually is not eating
noted. eating on time from now on
sunday cooking?
i'll do the shopping today
shrimp fried rice this week
green light
landlord asked about the renewal
we should talk about that. saturday?
the transit subsidy proposal is a mess
which section. i can look tonight
section 3. the funding stream justifies itself but the language is soft
share the doc. i'll tighten
sent
read. the third paragraph buries the ask
yes. rewrite?
one sentence swap. moved the ask to the top
much better
voss offered to review the advocacy language
take her up on it
already emailed
want to grab dinner tomorrow
yes. same place as last time?
yes. 7?
confirmed

agenda for thursday attached
